headings: City Plaza is more than a shopping mall— it’s a lifestyle hub. From fashion-forward boutiques and global brands to gourmet dining, cinema, family fun zones, and exciting events, we bring you everything under one roof.
sections.text: Retail Stores 150 + Annual Visitors 12 M+ Retail Stores 3,000 + Annual Visitors 10 (Including IMAX & 4DX) City Plaza is more than a shopping mall— it’s a lifestyle hub. From fashion-forward boutiques and global brands to gourmet dining, cinema, family fun zones, and exciting events, we bring you everything under one roof.

headings: Easy Access. Ample Parking. Open Daily.
sections.text: Plan your visit Easy Access. Ample Parking. Open Daily. Located in the heart of downtown, City Plaza is easily accessible by car, bus, or train. Enjoy free parking, valet services, and all-day convenience. Get Directions View Shops
